data.label: Fake
data.explanation: Ay naku, baliktad pala ang chismis! According to reliable sources, the Timberwolves won against the Spurs in Game 1. Imagine, sis, akala ko pa naman Spurs all the way!
evidence: Multiple trusted sources (ESPN, NYTimes, NBA.com) confirm the Timberwolves defeated the Spurs in Game 1.
The game took place on May 6, 2026, with the Timberwolves winning 104-102.
data.factCorrection: The claim says the Spurs won Game 1 against the Timberwolves, but according to ESPN and other sources, the Timberwolves actually won with a score of 104-102.

data.summary: Naku, sis, baliktad ang chismis! Timberwolves pala ang nanalo, hindi Spurs. Let's avoid spreading the wrong tea!
